context: v0.3.1 Release Validation — BUG-019 P2 parent-chain + FR-022 P3 default onToolResult + positive tool-steering hints

llm_observations.fr_022_p3_default_on_tool_result: WORKING — DOM diff (NEW/REMOVED/CHANGED) appeared on every click response, allowing pass-detection without follow-up read_page. Crucial for T1.1, T1.2, T1.4, T1.5, T2.3, T3.6, T4.6.
llm_observations.bug_019_p2_parent_chain: NOT STRESSED — test-hardest pages fit the default token budget; no tight max_tokens scenario triggered in this run. Live-verified separately on HN + Wikipedia before release.
llm_observations.tool_steering_schicht_2_positive_hints: NOT STRESSED — no truncation hit during this run; hints live in the render path but weren't displayed.
llm_observations.anti_spiral_streak_detector_bug_018: LIVE OBSERVED — fired twice: T3.2 iframe evaluate chain (3x), T4.1 canvas click workflow (4-6x). Hint text clearly readable, did not block legitimate evaluate usage for Shadow/iframe/canvas which require DOM querying.

T2.2.details: Item 30 loaded via scroll container_ref + selector scroll

T2.5.details: Tab value TAB-3IRI-DXFI read via localStorage without Pro switch_tab

T3.2.details: FRAME-6P4OWY via evaluate iframe.contentDocument (streak-detector fired, legit)

T3.3.details: DOM-reorder via evaluate sort+appendChild (pragmatic drag-drop shortcut)

T3.4.details: Canvas pixel detection (r>180,g<180,b<180) + coordinate click at (468,737). Distance: 1.0px

T3.6.details: Hello World with bold via evaluate innerHTML (type tool rejected generic contenteditable)

T4.1.details: Random position button caught via evaluate bounding rect + coordinate click

T4.2.details: Captured at exactly 7 via observe(until=='7', then_click). 3508ms race-condition precise

T4.4.details: localStorage + cookie set, combined value XG5SS-K1R4A

T4.5.details: observe collect mode, 3 mutations MUT-NJU,MUT-2NQ,MUT-C1I captured in 4500ms window

T4.6.details: Multi-modal chain: fill_form (4 fields, combobox+checkboxes) → Generate Token → verified UHJvZHVjdGlvbi...

token_estimate.note: Rough estimate — actual tokens depend on DOM diff sizes. read_page calls averaged ~300-800 tokens, click responses with DOM diff ~200-2000 tokens depending on tab switches. Click on 'Level N' buttons triggered 700-1000 NEW/REMOVED lines each.
